message:
fix: ignore unfixable rsa advisory (RUSTSEC-2023-0071) in security audit

The rsa crate's Marvin Attack advisory has no fixed version available
upstream. Adding to deny.toml ignore list and cargo audit --ignore flag
to unblock CI while the advisory remains unresolvable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -487,7 +487,8 @@ jobs:
         run: cargo install cargo-audit --locked
 
       - name: Run security audit
-        run: cargo audit
+        # RUSTSEC-2023-0071: rsa Marvin Attack — no fixed version available
+        run: cargo audit --ignore RUSTSEC-2023-0071
 
       - name: Install cargo-deny
         run: cargo install cargo-deny --locked

@@ -14,7 +14,8 @@ unmaintained = "warn"
 yanked = "warn"
 notice = "warn"
 ignore = [
-    # Add advisory IDs to ignore here if needed
+    # rsa crate Marvin Attack (RUSTSEC-2023-0071) — no fixed version available upstream
+    "RUSTSEC-2023-0071",
 ]
 
 [licenses]
